LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARTINEZ IS GRANTED, IN PART. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO GARNISH THE WAGES OF DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARTINEZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 400.00 PER MONTH. MR. MARTINEZ IN OPEN COURT GAVE HIS NEW ADDRESS FOR THE RECORD. ORDER SIGNED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - HUMBERTO MARTINEZ, TEL. NO. 336-4877, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Defendant/Judgment Debtor Martinez is Granted, in part. The Sheriff is directed to garnish the wages of Defendant/Judgment Debtor Martinez in the amount of $ 400.00 per month. Mr. Martinez in open court gave his new address for the record. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
